title: Show HN: Homegames. An open-source game platform I've been making for 8 years
text:
I'm making a platform for simple open source games you can play anywhere.

Games are all just JavaScript classes and you can read the source of every game on the platform.

I started working on initial "games" (mostly rendering tests) in 2018 and eventually built all of the platform stuff around it to make it easy to share games.

There's also an in-browser editor available for you to make and publish games all from the browser.

Would love some feedback on the games and studio features as well as the platform overall. All of the code is available at https://github.com/homegamesio
summary: 该帖介绍了一个作者耗时8年开发的开源游戏平台Homegames，所有游戏均为JavaScript类，支持在线编辑和发布，亮点在于完全透明可读的源码和浏览器内创作功能。

title: New AI tutor achieves 0.71-1.30 SD effect size in Dartmouth course [pdf]
summary: 该帖子介绍了一款新AI导师在达特茅斯学院课程中实现了0.71至1.30个标准差的学习效果提升，看点在于其显著超越传统教学方法的量化成效。

title: Mr. Baby Paint and accidentally discovering a new cellular automata
summary: 该帖子介绍作者在陪孩子玩“婴儿涂鸦”时，意外发现了一种新的细胞自动机规则，看点在于将育儿日常与复杂系统研究巧妙结合。

title: Had an idea for a Rust editor with simple Vim mode for learning
summary: 一个为学习Rust设计的轻量级编辑器，内置简易Vim模式，适合初学者边练边学。

title: DNSGlobe – Rust TUI to watch DNS propagate around the world
summary: DNSGlobe 是一个用 Rust 编写的终端界面工具，可实时可视化全球 DNS 传播情况，看点在于结合了实用性与炫酷的 TUI 交互体验。

title: OpenWiki: CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase
summary: OpenWiki 是一个命令行工具，能自动为代码库编写并维护智能体文档，亮点在于结合了LangChain的AI能力，简化了文档生成与更新流程。

title: Context graphs: how AI agents can store and use past decisions
summary: 该文章介绍了“上下文图”这一概念，即AI代理通过构建结构化记忆来存储和复用历史决策，从而提升推理的连贯性与效率。看点在于它提供了一种比传统向量数据库更直观、可解释的AI记忆管理方案。

title: Show HN: Sidenote – comment on your rendered blog, an LLM writes the Git diff
summary: Sidenote 是一个允许读者在渲染后的博客页面上直接评论的工具，亮点在于它会利用大语言模型自动将评论内容生成对应的 Git diff 修改。
